ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ic_components" (
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each IC component */,
  "luts" INTEGER /* Number of Look-Up Tables the IC contains */,
  "supply_voltage" TEXT /* Supply voltage required for the IC */,
  "package" TEXT /* Package type of the IC */,
  "leads" INTEGER /* Number of leads on the IC */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Operating temperature range of the IC */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the IC component */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the IC was produced */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period for the IC component */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the datasheet for the IC component */,
  "is_eol" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the IC component is end-of-life (EOL) */,
  "lead_free" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the IC component is lead-free */,
  "rohs_compliant" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the IC component is RoHS compliant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the IC component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the IC component in stock */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse where the IC component is stored */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory record was last updated */,
  "min_stock_level" INTEGER /* The minimum stock level that triggers a reorder */,
  "max_stock_level" INTEGER /* The maximum stock level to avoid overstocking */,
  "last_check_date" TEXT /* The date when the inventory was last physically checked */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* The stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the inventory value is tracked */,
  "language" TEXT /* The language in which the inventory details are stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_part_number FOREIGN KEY ("part_number") REFERENCES ic_components ("part_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the IC component being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the IC component ordered */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier from whom the IC component is being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the IC component */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, In Transit, Delivered) */,
  "purchase_order_number" TEXT /* The purchase order number for the order */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the order is placed */,
  "language" TEXT /* The language in which the order details are stored */,
  "delivery_address" TEXT /* The address to which the order should be delivered */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* The name of the contact person for the order */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* The email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* The phone number of the contact person */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* The method of shipping (e.g., air, sea, ground) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* The tracking number for the shipment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* The payment status of the order (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_part_number FOREIGN KEY ("part_number") REFERENCES ic_components ("part_number")
)
